changelog: 🖥️ Ask about your machine and get real answers — "what's my local IP", "how much memory does this system have", "find out the external IP", CPU, graphics card, hostname, battery, uptime and more, read from the system itself, never guessed.
🔌 "Reboot this computer" / "shut down" / "put it to sleep" — real power control by voice, always confirmed with a yes/no first.
🛡️ Hardened: a mis-heard sentence can no longer flip autonomous mode, and "how much disk space" is fixed (it had crashed quietly since the beginning).
